argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json,textwrap
component=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py"); data=component.read_bytes(); text=data.decode("utf-8"); compile(text,str(component),"exec")
assert len(data)==7742 and hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()=="765983b563f8495138c9670849de5c4703f4735a0ddc9324efd6580606fc517b"
assert text.count('if message.startswith("/"): return {"intercepted":False,"diagnostic":"slash command bypassed self-knowledge interception"}')==1
assert text.index('if message.startswith("/")') < text.index('try: result=_load_adapter(adapter_path).route_message(message,"webui")')
web=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py"); webdata=web.read_bytes(); assert hashlib.sha256(webdata).hexdigest()=="d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952"
begin=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_BEGIN\n"; end=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_END\n"; assert webdata.count(begin)==1 and webdata.count(end)==1
s=webdata.index(begin); e=webdata.index(end,s)+len(end); seam=webdata[s:e]; assert len(seam)==1824 and hashlib.sha256(seam).hexdigest()=="36195f2bec555a2c9ec9fc6d9f981d0522f059fb0e069a3f5143cdcd5ad54961"
assert hashlib.sha256(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py").read_bytes()).hexdigest()=="a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7"
assert hashlib.sha256(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\ui\main_window.py").read_bytes()).hexdigest()=="cd20a1785a574eae44e290c1af1c1da7ac2bb66559f7d9ce8e93a9b2d6516b36"
snap=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-035904-291200"); manifests=sorted(snap.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
m=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8")); entries=m["entries"]; assert len(entries)==1
row=entries[0]; assert row["relative_path"]=="System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py" and row["existed"] is True and row["sha256"]=="ed20fce59691875ff409caef0a879243e277d4628e73fcf0981b3e8387fb599c" and row["size"]==7587
print("WEBUI_SLASH_PRIORITY_PREIMAGE_POSTIMAGE_SNAPSHOT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact component postimage, one-file snapshot preimage, WebUI seam, adapter, and Desktop isolation
Validate slash-command bypass occurs before adapter loading and preserves other component routes

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,importlib.util,io,json,textwrap
web=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py"); raw=web.read_bytes(); begin=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_BEGIN\n"; end=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_END\n"; s=raw.index(begin); e=raw.index(end,s)+len(end)
seam=textwrap.dedent(raw[s:e].decode("utf-8")); source="def run(self):\n"+textwrap.indent(seam,"    ")+"    self.original_route_calls += 1\n"; ns={}; exec(compile(source,"<slash-priority-live-seam>","exec"),ns); run=ns["run"]
class H:
 def __init__(self,route,body): self.path=route; self.headers={"Content-Length":str(len(body))}; self.rfile=io.BytesIO(body); self.wfile=io.BytesIO(); self.status=[]; self.headers_out=[]; self.ends=0; self.original_route_calls=0
 def send_response(self,x): self.status.append(x)
 def send_header(self,k,v): self.headers_out.append((k,v))
 def end_headers(self): self.ends+=1
commands=["/engineer workshop begin Test :: list protected contexts","/engineer workshop preview \"Z:\\FOXAI\\PLAN.json\"","/engineer workshop apply deadbeef","/help"]
rows=[]
for route in ("/api/chat/send","/api/chat/stream"):
 for command in commands:
  body=(json.dumps({"message":command},separators=(",",":"))+"\n").encode(); h=H(route,body); run(h)
  assert h.original_route_calls==1 and h.wfile.getvalue()==b"" and h.status==[] and h.rfile.getvalue()==body
  rows.append({"class":"slash_command","endpoint":route,"command":command,"original_route_calls":1,"message_preserved":True,"passed":True})
 recognized_body=(json.dumps({"message":"Agent Fox, list protected contexts"},separators=(",",":"))+"\n").encode(); h=H(route,recognized_body); run(h); assert h.original_route_calls==0 and h.status==[200] and h.wfile.getvalue()
 rows.append({"class":"recognized_self_knowledge","endpoint":route,"original_route_calls":0,"passed":True})
 ordinary_body=(json.dumps({"message":"Tell me a joke"},separators=(",",":"))+"\n").encode(); h=H(route,ordinary_body); run(h); assert h.original_route_calls==1 and h.rfile.getvalue()==ordinary_body and h.wfile.getvalue()==b""
 rows.append({"class":"ordinary_chat","endpoint":route,"original_route_calls":1,"message_preserved":True,"passed":True})
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-035904-291200_WEBUI_SLASH_COMMAND_PRIORITY_REPAIR"); out.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=False)
def write(name,obj): (out/name).write_bytes((json.dumps(obj,indent=2,sort_keys=True)+"\n").encode("utf-8"))
write("SLASH_COMMAND_PRIORITY_TEST_MATRIX.json",{"schema":"slash_priority.tests.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-035904-291200","test_count":len(rows),"slash_command_case_count":8,"recognized_case_count":2,"ordinary_case_count":2,"all_passed":all(r["passed"] for r in rows),"rows":rows})
write("SLASH_COMMAND_ROUTE_PRESERVATION.json",{"schema":"slash_priority.preservation.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-035904-291200","slash_commands_intercepted":0,"slash_commands_original_route_exactly_once":8,"request_bytes_preserved":True,"adapter_loads_for_slash_commands":0,"webui_seam_modified":False})
print(json.dumps({"status":"exact_live_seam_priority_tests_passed","cases":len(rows)}))
validations.name: Execute exact live WebUI seam for slash commands, recognized self-knowledge, and ordinary chat

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-035904-291200_WEBUI_SLASH_COMMAND_PRIORITY_REPAIR")
def canon(obj): return (json.dumps(obj,indent=2,sort_keys=True)+"\n").encode("utf-8")
def write(name,obj):
 data=canon(obj); assert b"\r" not in data; (out/name).write_bytes(data)
matrix=json.loads((out/"SLASH_COMMAND_PRIORITY_TEST_MATRIX.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); preserve=json.loads((out/"SLASH_COMMAND_ROUTE_PRESERVATION.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); assert matrix["all_passed"] and matrix["test_count"]==12
write("SLASH_COMMAND_PRIORITY_CONTRACT.json",{"schema":"slash_priority.contract.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-035904-291200","rule":"first message character slash bypasses self-knowledge before adapter load","endpoints":["/api/chat/send","/api/chat/stream"],"ordinary_chat_behavior_changed":False,"recognized_self_knowledge_behavior_changed":False,"webui_seam_modified":False,"desktop_modified":False})
write("SLASH_COMMAND_PRIORITY_RECEIPT.json",{"schema":"slash_priority.receipt.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-035904-291200","status":"built_and_verified","changed_paths":["System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py"],"pre_sha256":"ed20fce59691875ff409caef0a879243e277d4628e73fcf0981b3e8387fb599c","post_sha256":"765983b563f8495138c9670849de5c4703f4735a0ddc9324efd6580606fc517b","slash_command_case_count":8,"total_case_count":12,"adapter_loads_for_slash_commands":0,"webui_source_modified":False,"desktop_modified":False,"network_used":False,"packages_installed":False,"models_loaded":False,"comfyui_launched":False,"k_accessed":False})
files=sorted(out.glob("*.json")); assert len(files)==4
for p in files:
 data=p.read_bytes(); obj=json.loads(data); assert data==canon(obj) and b"\r" not in data
print(json.dumps({"status":"four_evidence_outputs_built","count":4,"total_bytes":sum(p.stat().st_size for p in files)}))
validations.name: Build deterministic LF-only slash-command priority evidence outputs
Prove slash commands cannot invoke the adapter and unrelated live sources remain unchanged

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-035904-291200_WEBUI_SLASH_COMMAND_PRIORITY_REPAIR"); names={"SLASH_COMMAND_PRIORITY_TEST_MATRIX.json","SLASH_COMMAND_ROUTE_PRESERVATION.json","SLASH_COMMAND_PRIORITY_CONTRACT.json","SLASH_COMMAND_PRIORITY_RECEIPT.json"}
assert {p.name for p in out.iterdir()}==names
assert sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.iterdir())<8*1024*1024
for p in out.iterdir():
 data=p.read_bytes(); assert b"\r" not in data; json.loads(data)
print(json.dumps({"status":"slash_command_priority_repair_verified","outputs":4,"k_accessed":False}))
validations.name: Validate exact evidence output set, canonical bytes, size ceiling, and safety boundary
